Hamilton, Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Court ordered OSC to John Hughes Russell, Esq., off calendar and dissolved/fee waived. Court ordered Robert P. Hamilton, Esq., sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear.
